description: A server for retrieving trending repositories and developers from GitHub, with filtering options by programming language, time period, and spoken language.

tools.name: get_github_trending_repositories
tools.description: Retrieves a list of trending repositories from GitHub based on specified filters such as programming language, time period, and spoken language.

language.description: Programming language to filter trending items by. Must be lowercase letters only, no spaces or special characters (e.g., "python", "javascript", "cpp", "csharp", "go", "rust", "java").

period.description: Time period for trending calculation. Valid values are "daily", "weekly", or "monthly".

spoken_language.description: Spoken language to filter repositories by. Must be an ISO 639-1 two-letter language code in lowercase (e.g., "en", "zh", "ja", "es", "fr", "de", "ko").

limit.description: Maximum number of trending repositories to return.

repositories.description: List of trending GitHub repositories matching the specified filters.

rank.description: The repository's position in the trending list.

name.description: The short name of the repository.

fullname.description: The full name of the repository in the format "owner/repo".

url.description: The URL to the repository on GitHub.

description.description: A brief description of the repository's purpose and functionality.

language.description: The primary programming language used in the repository.

stars.description: The total number of stars the repository has received.

forks.description: The total number of times the repository has been forked.

current_period_stars.description: The number of stars gained during the specified trending period.

tools.name: get_github_trending_developers
tools.description: Retrieves a list of trending developers from GitHub based on specified filters such as programming language and time period.

language.description: Programming language to filter trending items by. Must be lowercase letters only, no spaces or special characters (e.g., "python", "javascript", "cpp", "csharp", "go", "rust", "java").

period.description: Time period for trending calculation. Valid values are "daily", "weekly", or "monthly".

limit.description: Maximum number of trending developers to return.

developers.description: List of trending GitHub developers matching the specified filters.

rank.description: The developer's position in the trending list.

username.description: The GitHub username of the developer.

name.description: The display name of the developer.

url.description: The URL to the developer's GitHub profile.

avatar.description: The URL to the developer's avatar image.

repo.description: The featured repository associated with the trending developer.

name.description: The name of the developer's featured repository.

description.description: A brief description of the featured repository's purpose and functionality.

url.description: The URL to the featured repository on GitHub.
